content:
Thank you for your question🩷 ! We've actually considered this as well.
Currently, there are 30 winning slots in the drawing category. First, we evaluate and rank the works based on their quality, and distribute rewards of varying value accordingly. Excellent works will receive higher rewards and will also be displayed in the community.
Second, if the number of submitted works is less than 30, and some works aren't of particularly high quality, we'll also take into account the community's reaction to these works (such as interaction data) to decide whether to award them.
We welcome everyone to share their creative works<:pray:1356053116260454534>

i see. simply because it garnered many reactions from how "funny" and terrible looking it is, it won. plus, he's pretty well known in the en community so it's given that there's a lot of users who will react to it. basically a fan favorite award

i still think it falls to the "too brief/sloppy" work but that's just my opinion. if your team thinks he deserve that instead of participation reward, then there's nothing more i can say

thank you for replying to me and i apologize for bringing this up
<@1154601435141509192>Thank you for your suggestion. We have discussed this issue carefully and will be more rigorous in selecting works in the future, prioritizing quality to ensure fairness🙏
